prompt: Pure narration, no screenshots. User describes 2 bugs: channel filter resets when switching advertisers, location count in header doesn't update after clearing filters until map pan.

assertions.text: Extracts exactly 2 findings matching user's 2 described bugs (filter reset, location count stale)
Handles missing screenshots gracefully — no error, still produces findings and code traces
Uses [CLARIFY] where narration is ambiguous (e.g., which specific filter, which count display)
Does NOT fabricate visual observations it couldn't have seen (no screenshot references)
